data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Verified: (1) Enter in search bar routes to /beats?view=search&q=..., (2) shared beats-view.ts eliminates duplicate parsing in page.tsx and app-header.tsx, (3) search treated as list view for data fetching, (4) clearing q from search view exits to queues while preserving non-search views, (5) no security issues, (6) 5 unit tests + 2 layout regression tests cover all paths, (7) all quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2003 tests pass, build succeeds).
